creator: mihara@prd.fc.nec.co.jp
text:
There are two typos in xl.4 manual page. In the manual source
(/usr/src/share/man/man4/man4.i386)

1) line 76: "fine" should be "file"
2) line 80: "abso" should be "also"

- line number above is based on 
  .\"     $Id: xl.4,v 1.3 1998/12/05 09:36:15 rnordier Exp $

Fix: 

Make above corrention on man source file.
How-To-Repeat: man 4 xl
